title: BEM-866 queue before commit
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
# Remove old late queue step if present.
old = '''
      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: |
          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || true
'''
text = text.replace(old, '
')
new = '''
      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue before commit
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: |
          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || true

'''
anchor = '      - name: Commit and push everything
'
if 'Process workflow dispatch queue before commit' not in text and anchor in text:
    text = text.replace(anchor, new + anchor)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_BEFORE_COMMIT.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 queue step before commit
Status: PATCHED
Step: Process workflow dispatch queue before commit
', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('moved workflow dispatch queue processing before commit step')
"""
